Interface IUtilityNetworkAttribute

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of a utility network attribute.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("E19E55A1-525B-402B-9FDB-EDD9BAB04E20")]
public interface IUtilityNetworkAttribute

Properties

Assignments

Returns the assignments.

IArray Assignments { get; }

IArray
